news.paragraph: Eli Lilly is seeing positive momentum following clinical trial results showing that Foundayo and lower-dose Zepbound provided durable weight-loss maintenance. This data supports a potential shift toward oral treatments in the obesity market and reinforces the company's growth outlook. Options traders should consider these clinical developments as they impact the long-term trajectory of the company's incretin therapy franchise.
headlines: Eli Lilly Says Foundayo, Lower-Dose Zepbound Provided Durable Weight-Loss Maintenance in 2 Trials
Eli Lilly Obesity Data Support Oral Shift And Undervalued Growth Story
Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights Eli Lilly, Novo, JP Morgan, Coca-Cola, PepsiCO and Mondelez
It’s a Growth Stock World—and Nothing Is Going to Change That
Lilly's Foundayo and lower-dose Zepbound helped people maintain weight loss after switching from higher doses of injectable incretin therapy in two late-phase trials
